_comment: Company board tokens for the public Greenhouse/Lever/Ashby JSON APIs. These are open, unauthenticated, and explicitly meant for public consumption (they power each company's own careers page) - no ToS risk like Indeed/LinkedIn scraping. Add more via ATS_EXTRA_BOARDS in .env (format: token or token:platform), or add directly here.
_comment_regional: careem, tamara (greenhouse), swiggy, freshworks, upstox (smartrecruiters), unifonic (recruitee) added 2026-07 as part of the Middle East/Asia expansion - all verified live against the public API directly (curl, 200 + real postings) before adding, not guessed. See job-scraper README / memory for the ME-board research that motivated this (Bayt/GulfTalent/NaukriGulf have no free API, unlike these).
